Read `NNN-BRIEF.md` and `NNN-DESIGN.md` when present. Ask if scope is unclear.

Turn agreed scope into a milestone-based implementation plan. 
Each task must be one `/build-step`-sized unit, completable and verifiable on its own.

Output: Read `schemas/PLAN.md` for context. Create or update `NNN-PLAN.md`.
